products.name: Hei-VAP Core Rotary Evaporator
products.metaTitle: Hei-VAP Core Rotary Evaporator | Heidolph | Inkarp
products.metaDescription: Inkarp offers the Heidolph Hei-VAP Core Rotary Evaporator in India with hand lift and motor lift options, multiple glassware configurations, digital control, safety functions and complete application support.
products.overview: The Hei-VAP Core Rotary Evaporator is engineered for essential, everyday distillation tasks. It combines reliability, safety, and simplicity, making it a strong choice for routine evaporation, concentration, distillation and solvent recovery applications in research and industry.

technicalSpecs.label: Product name
technicalSpecs.value: Hei-VAP Core - hand-lift model with G3 vertical glassware

technicalSpecs.label: Dimensions (Motor Lift, W x H x D)
Dimensions (Manual Lift, W x H x D)

features: Clear Digital Display: Easily monitor actual and set values for both rotation speed and heating bath temperature.

Dual Control Knobs with Dynamic Tuning: Separate knobs provide intuitive control, fast rotation for quick changes, slow rotation for precision adjustments, and a lock function to prevent accidental value changes.
Intuitive LED Ring Light System: Illuminated indicators show active functions from a distance, ensuring quick and clear status checks.
Manual Immersion and Inclination Adjustment: Flexible immersion depth up to 155 mm and inclination angle from 20 deg to 80 deg to support a wide range of evaporation needs.
Standby Function and Residual Heat Warning: Safety functions halt active operations and warn the user when bath temperatures exceed 50 deg C.
Available in Hand or Motor Lift Models: Choose between a manual hand lift or automated motor lift version depending on your operational preferences.
Hand Lift Model with G3 Vertical Glassware: Offers efficient vertical condensation, ideal for standard distillation processes.
Simplified Operation: Minimalistic and intuitive controls reduce the learning curve, enabling lab personnel to operate the system efficiently with minimal training.

Enhanced Visibility and Safety: The integrated LED ring light provides instant visual feedback on system status, while the residual heat warning alerts users when bath temperatures exceed safe levels.
Precision Control: Dual dynamic control knobs allow fast or fine-tuned adjustments to rotation speed and temperature without navigating complicated digital menus.
Space-Saving Vertical Glassware: The G3 vertical glassware setup offers efficient condensation while minimizing equipment footprint, supporting faster solvent recovery.
Flexible and Adaptable: Adjustable immersion depth up to 155 mm and inclination angle from 20 deg to 80 deg accommodate a variety of flask sizes and sample volumes.
Cost-Effective for Routine Applications: Balances performance and affordability, offering high-value functionality for labs looking to maximize return on investment.
applications: Pharmaceutical solvent removal, API concentration, purification support and reaction work-up.
Chemical research workflows including organic synthesis, distillation, solvent recovery and compound concentration.
Academic and teaching laboratories that need simple, safe and reliable rotary evaporation.
Food and beverage testing workflows for sample preparation, extract concentration and solvent removal.
Environmental testing laboratories for sample concentration and evaporation before analysis.
Biotech and life science laboratories where controlled concentration and safe sample handling matter.

faqs.question: Is the Hei-VAP Core suitable for routine solvent evaporation?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Hei-VAP Core is designed for routine solvent evaporation, sample concentration, distillation and solvent recovery workflows.

faqs.question: Is the Hei-VAP Core available in hand-lift and motor-lift versions?
faqs.answer: Yes. The system is available as both hand-lift and motor-lift models, so you can choose the lifting mechanism that suits your operating style.

faqs.question: Which glassware options are available?
faqs.answer: Available options include G3 vertical glassware, G3 XL vertical glassware, G5 dry-ice condenser, G6 vertical glassware and G1 diagonal glassware. Coated condenser and receiving-flask options are also available.

faqs.question: What is the speed range?
faqs.answer: The Hei-VAP Core supports a rotation-speed range of 10-280 rpm via a durable EC motor.

faqs.question: What is the heating-bath temperature range?
faqs.answer: The bath supports 20-100 deg C with water and 20-210 deg C with oil.

faqs.question: What safety features are included?
faqs.answer: The system includes a lock function, standby function, residual-heat warning, over-temperature protection and 250 deg C overheat protection.

faqs.question: Can Inkarp help select the right configuration?
faqs.answer: Yes. Inkarp can help select the right lift type, glassware set, vacuum pump, chiller, coating option and accessories based on your workflow.

faqs.question: Who installs and services it in India?
faqs.answer: Inkarp Instruments supplies, installs and services the Hei-VAP Core across India, with product consultation, configuration guidance, installation support, user training, preventive maintenance and service support.

faqs.question: How much does the Hei-VAP Core cost?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on the lift type, glassware set, coating, vacuum pump and chiller you choose. Request a configured quote and an Inkarp specialist will provide current pricing for your exact setup.

faqs.question: Can I see it before buying?
faqs.answer: Yes. Request a demo and Inkarp will arrange to show the Hei-VAP Core, ideally with your own solvents, so you can confirm rate and recovery before you decide.

longForm.heroLead: Reliable rotary evaporation for routine laboratory workflows. The Heidolph Hei-VAP Core is designed for labs that want dependable solvent evaporation, sample concentration and solvent recovery without unnecessary complexity, with direct access to rotation speed and heating-bath temperature for better control, visibility and confidence. Available in hand-lift and motor-lift versions with multiple glassware configurations.

sections.title: Hei-VAP Core at a glance
sections.description: Everything needed to evaluate the rotary evaporator: overview, features, applications, specifications, quality and compliance, configurations, packages and documentation.
body: The Hei-VAP Core from Heidolph is built for laboratories that need a dependable rotary evaporator for routine evaporation, distillation, solvent recovery and sample concentration. Its operating concept is focused on the essentials: users can access the two most important parameters, rotation speed and heating-bath temperature, at any time.

The clear digital display shows actual values and set values, helping operators monitor the evaporation process without confusion. Separate control knobs allow quick value changes as well as precise fine adjustment. As a Heidolph distributor and service provider in India, Inkarp supports laboratories with product consultation, application guidance, configuration assistance, installation, user training and after-sales service.

sections.title: The rotary evaporation cycle
sections.description: How the Hei-VAP Core gently removes solvent in a continuous loop of rotate, heat, evaporate, condense and collect.

steps.title: Rotate
steps.description: The flask spins (10–280 rpm), spreading a thin film for a large surface area.

steps.title: Heat
steps.description: The water/oil bath (20–210 °C) gently warms the sample.

steps.title: Evaporate
steps.description: Under vacuum, solvent boils off at low temperature, protecting the product.

steps.title: Condense
steps.description: Vapour cools on the G3 condenser (0.22 m² surface) back to liquid.

steps.title: Collect
steps.description: Recovered solvent drains into the receiving flask; product stays behind.

sections.disclaimer: This workflow explanation is illustrative. Real rates depend on solvent type, vacuum level, bath temperature, condenser setup, cooling efficiency and sample volume.

sections.title: Published evaporation performance
sections.description: The Hei-VAP Core delivers reliable evaporation performance for commonly used laboratory solvents under continuous-operation conditions.
sections.disclaimer: Published rates are based on delta T 40 deg C. Actual performance depends on the solvent, vacuum, cooling, glassware and sample conditions.

sections.title: Which solvent are you evaporating?
sections.description: Starting guidance for common solvents, glassware, cooling, vacuum and accessory choices.

cards.title: Toluene
cards.description: Bath 80 deg C, vapour around 40 deg C, about 77 mbar, up to 8.5 L/h.
items: Standard G3 vertical glassware works well; choose G3 XL for higher throughput.
Standard chiller cooling around 10-15 deg C is usually sufficient.
Hei-VAC Valve Tec pump plus Hei-CHILL Peltier chiller.

cards.title: Acetone
cards.description: Bath 40 deg C, vapour around 20 deg C, about 556 mbar, up to 5.8 L/h.
items: Stronger cooling helps capture volatile vapour.
Hei-VAC Vario pump, Hei-CHILL chiller and Woulff bottle.

cards.title: Ethanol
cards.description: Bath 50 deg C, vapour around 26 deg C, about 175 mbar, up to 3.5 L/h.
items: Hei-VAC Valve Tec or Vario pump plus Hei-CHILL chiller.

cards.title: Water
cards.description: Bath 80 deg C, vapour around 42 deg C, about 72 mbar, up to 1.2 L/h.
items: Standard G3 vertical glassware; G3 XL can help slow aqueous evaporation.
Hei-VAC Valve Tec pump plus Hei-CHILL chiller.

cards.title: Methanol
cards.description: Bath 40 deg C, vapour around 25 deg C, about 337 mbar.
items: Standard G3; consider G5 dry-ice condenser for lower losses.
Hei-VAC Vario pump, deep Hei-CHILL chiller and Woulff bottle.

cards.title: Dichloromethane
cards.description: Bath 35 deg C, vapour around 15 deg C, about 850 mbar.
items: Strong or dry-ice cooling to capture fugitive vapour.
Hei-VAC Vario pump with deep cooling.

sections.disclaimer: These are common starting points for guidance only. Optimal settings depend on your sample, glassware, chiller, altitude and laboratory safety rules.

sections.title: Which Hei-VAP Core setup should I start from?
sections.description: The final setup depends on lift preference, glassware, coating, solvent volatility, recovery needs and cooling strategy.

cards.title: Lift type
cards.description: Choose hand lift for direct manual control or motor lift for powered flask movement and standby lifting.

cards.title: Glassware
cards.description: Start with G3 vertical glassware for routine evaporation, G3 XL for higher capacity, G5 dry-ice condenser for low-boiling solvents, G6 vertical or G1 diagonal for specific layouts.

cards.title: Coating
cards.description: Choose coated condenser and receiving flask where added safety around glassware is preferred.

cards.title: Accessories
cards.description: Match the system with Hei-VAC vacuum pump, Hei-CHILL chiller and Woulff bottle based on solvent and recovery goals.

sections.title: Is the Hei-VAP Core right for you?
sections.description: A quick buyer-oriented view for teams deciding whether this model belongs in their lab.

cards.title: Choose Core if
cards.description: You want reliable routine evaporation, clear controls, visible status, safety basics and a cost-effective Heidolph platform.

cards.title: Add accessories if
cards.description: You need better solvent recovery, low-boiling solvent handling, pump protection or consistent cooling.

cards.description: You are unsure about glassware, vacuum, chiller, coated glass, price, installation or service coverage.

sections.title: Choose the right glassware set
sections.description: Glassware selection controls condensation, footprint, solvent compatibility and safety preference.

cards.title: G3 vertical glassware
cards.description: Standard vertical setup for routine evaporation and solvent recovery. Ships with the common Hei-VAP Core model.

cards.title: G3 XL vertical glassware
cards.description: Larger vertical option for higher condensation capacity or larger evaporation requirements.

cards.title: G5 dry-ice condenser
cards.description: Suitable for low-boiling solvents and workflows where dry-ice condensation is preferred.

cards.title: G6 vertical glassware
cards.description: Vertical configuration for specific condensation and application requirements.

cards.title: G1 diagonal glassware
cards.description: Diagonal setup suitable for selected workflows and space preferences.

cards.title: Coated glass option
cards.description: Coated condenser and receiving flask add protection around glass components; choose uncoated for general workflows.

sections.title: Pair the right vacuum pump and chiller
sections.description: The rotary evaporator performs best when the vacuum and cooling setup are matched to solvent behaviour.

cards.title: Standard solvents
cards.description: Hei-VAC Valve Tec pump is a strong-value match for standard evaporation work.

cards.title: Low-boiling or mixed solvents
cards.description: Hei-VAC Vario Tec adapts vacuum continuously and is useful for volatile or mixed solvent workflows.

cards.title: Recovery priority
cards.description: RPM-regulated vacuum gives smoother control and supports better recovery.

cards.title: Chiller choice
cards.description: Use tap or loop water where available; choose Hei-CHILL Peltier for compact quiet cooling or Hei-CHILL 350/600 for deeper cooling needs.

cards.title: Accessories
cards.description: A Woulff bottle helps protect the pump and can improve secondary recovery.

results.title: Consider an automated Hei-VAP model
results.body: The Core provides manual control with digital display. If full automation (auto lift, end-point detection) is essential, other Hei-VAP models offer those capabilities.

results.title: Larger volumes may need a bigger system
results.body: The Hei-VAP Core is optimised up to about 3 L. For consistently larger volumes, ask Inkarp about larger glassware or a different Hei-VAP platform.

results.title: Excellent fit – ideal for teaching labs
results.body: The focused two-knob control concept and clear display make it ideal for teaching environments where simplicity and safety are priorities.

results.title: Great fit – gentle, low-temperature distillation
results.body: Vacuum reduces boiling points, allowing gentle evaporation without high bath temperatures. Pair with a Hei-CHILL chiller for best performance.

results.title: Strong fit – efficient solvent recovery
results.body: With up to 8.5 L/h for toluene and 0.22 m² condenser surface, the Hei-VAP Core handles routine recovery well. Add a Woulff bottle for pump protection.

results.title: Excellent fit – reliable everyday evaporator
results.body: The Hei-VAP Core is a strong match for routine laboratory evaporation with focused control, digital display, LED ring and essential safety functions.

pairing.title: Pair the right vacuum pump and chiller

recommendations.pumpNote: Strong value for standard evaporation workflows.
Continuous vacuum adjustment for better control and repeatability.
recommendations.chillerNote: Deeper, more consistent cooling for higher throughput.

recommendations.pumpNote: Quieter operation compared to rotary vane pumps.
recommendations.chillerNote: Silent Peltier cooling – no compressor noise.

recommendations.pumpNote: Essential for volatile solvents – adjusts vacuum continuously to prevent bumping.
recommendations.chillerNote: Deeper cooling captures fugitive volatile vapours.
recommendations.accessoryNote: Protects pump from solvent carryover and improves secondary recovery.

recommendations.pumpNote: Standard pump works well for aqueous solvents.
recommendations.chillerNote: Standard cooling usually sufficient for high-boiling solvents.
